title: Sweet Crisp Algerian Stout Stir-fry
description: This energizing dish combines the rich depth of an Alsatian stout with a crispy texture, perfect for breakfast or snack time.

ingredients.name: Stout Beer (ready to serve)
ingredients.notes: Ensure the beer is at room temperature

ingredients.name: Almonds, sliced
ingredients.notes: Use raw or lightly toasted almonds

ingredients.name: Avocado, diced
ingredients.notes: Choose ripe but not overripe avocados

ingredients.name: Sunflower Seeds
ingredients.notes: Optional for extra crunch and flavor

instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat. Add the ready-to-serve beer.
As soon as it starts to simmer, add the sliced almonds. Stir occasionally for about 3 minutes or until lightly golden.
Add the diced avocado and sunflower seeds (if using) to the pan with the almonds. Continue stirring for an additional 1 minute to mix in all ingredients.
Season with a pinch of salt if desired. Remove from heat immediately after adding the avocado to prevent it from turning too mushy.
